chapter.label: Tale 12
chapter.title: A saying of abba olympios disease in order that my soul should be saved’, and he glorified God

paragraphs.text: A brother asked Abba Olympios, the priest of the Lavra of Abba Gerasimos, to say something to him;* this is what he said: "Do not 15, THE WONDROUS DEED OF ABBA CONON consort with heretics; keep a watch over the tongue and the belly and wherever you stay, keep on saying <to yourself> “I am a They said that Abba Conon, higoumen of the Penthoucla <monasstranger." tery>, met sorne Hebrews one day when he was on his way to the holy place of the Bites.* They wanted to kill him; they drew their
